headline: CarMax Gears Up to Report Q4 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: KMX heads into Q4 earnings with falling EPS forecasts as soft used-car demand weigh on expectations.

headline: AutoZone: Uncertainty Presents An Opportunity (Rating Upgrade)
